metadata.title: Hover Editor
metadata.description: Transform the Page Preview hover popover into a fully working editor instance

regex.source: .setDesc("Allow hover preview to trigger when hovering over any type of rendered embed such as images or block references")
regex.target: .setDesc("允许在悬停于图像或块引用等任何类型的嵌入项上方时触发悬停预览")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the hover editor as the active pane when opened")
regex.target: .setDesc("打开时将悬停编辑器设为活动窗格")

regex.source: .setDesc("When double clicking to minimize, the window will roll down instead of rolling up")
regex.target: .setDesc("当双击最小化时，窗口将向下滚动而不是向上滚动")

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Show the view header by default when triggering a hover editor.
         When disabled, view headers will only show if you click the view header icon to the left of the minimize button.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`触发悬停编辑器时，默认显示视图头部。
         禁用时，只有当你点击最小化按钮左侧的视图头部图标时才会显示视图头部。`)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Click and hold an image within a hover editor to temporarily maximize the popover and image to fill the entire viewport. 
        On mouse up, the hover editor will restore to its original size.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`在悬停编辑器内点击并按住图像以临时最大化弹出窗口和图像，使其充满整个视口。
        在释放鼠标后，悬停编辑器将恢复到原始大小。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("How long to wait before showing a Hover Editor when hovering over a link")
regex.target: .setDesc("在悬停于链接上方之前等待多久才显示悬停编辑器")

regex.source: .setDesc("How long to wait before closing a Hover Editor once the mouse leaves")
regex.target: .setDesc("在鼠标离开后等待多久才关闭悬停编辑器")
.setTitle("将悬停编辑器停靠到工作区")

regex.source: .textContent=`${a} is not yet created. Click to create.`
name:"Open link under cursor in new Hover Editor"
regex.target: name:"在新的悬停编辑器中打开光标下的链接"

regex.source: name:"Open current file in new Hover Editor"
regex.target: name:"在新的悬停编辑器中打开当前文件"

regex.source: name:"Convert active pane to Hover Editor"
regex.target: name:"将活动窗格转换为悬停编辑器"

regex.source: name:"Dock active Hover Editor to workspace"
regex.target: name:"将活动悬停编辑器停靠到工作区"
name:"最小化活动悬停编辑器"
name:"将活动悬停编辑器对齐到 ${a}"

regex.source: Na={preview:"Reading view",source:"Editing view",match:"Match current view"},qa={onMove:"On drag or resize",always:"Always"}
regex.target: Na={preview: "阅读视图",source: "编辑视图",match: "匹配当前视图"},qa={onMove: "在拖动或调整大小时",always: "始终"}

重要提示：这个影响功能，不要翻译"name:"gesture"
